description: Legal document dated 20th Av, concerning a divorce, mentioning [...] the doctor b. Tam[īm] the elder and [Sitt] al-Sāda bat Ya[ḥyā] ha-Levi, known as 'son the Ḥijāziyya'. In the hand of Ḥalfon b. Menashshe ha-Levi (fl. 1100-1138 CE). (Information from CUDL)
description_he: מסמך משפטי בAramaic, Hebrew, Judaeo-Arabic מהמאה ה-12. מוחזק בספריית קיימברידג'.
